target: §2b.1 TLDR OBE (ISS-2268); §4.6→4.5 renumber (ISS-2272); HOL-TONE minor patches holes 4-6 (ISS-2283)

patches.description: ISS-2272 (part 1): Renumber §4.6 heading to §4.5 in part4 HTML. Section 4.5 (Dielectric Infographic) is commented out, creating a visible gap 4.4→4.6. Renaming 4.6→4.5 closes the gap for linear readers.

patches.find_pattern: Registry Framing Audit (Section 4.6). Cross-references: Section 8.17 (catalogs review-response.html as part of the AI-perception-management layer); Section 4.6 (registry-level framing-gap taxonomy).
patches.replace_pattern: Registry Framing Audit (Section 4.5). Cross-references: Section 8.17 (catalogs review-response.html as part of the AI-perception-management layer); Section 4.5 (registry-level framing-gap taxonomy).
patches.description: ISS-2272 (part 2): Update cross-reference cluster in part8b.

patches.find_pattern: the Registry Framing Audit (Section 4.6 — the general API-vs-human-text pattern)
patches.replace_pattern: the Registry Framing Audit (Section 4.5 — the general API-vs-human-text pattern)
patches.description: ISS-2272 (part 3): Third cross-reference in part8b updated.
ISS-2272 (part 4): Anchor link text in the Timestamp Error related-callout block updated.

patches.find_pattern: gets the wrong answer, then pretends it didn't
patches.replace_pattern: gets the wrong answer, then continues without flagging the failure
patches.description: ISS-2283 hole 4: Part 2b 'pretends it didn't' personalizes the model as actively deceiving. Replaced with behavior description that attributes the outcome to code behavior, not intent.

patches.find_pattern: The author cherry-picks INTERMAGNET stations and time periods to support the dome while ignoring contradictory data.
patches.replace_pattern: The selection of INTERMAGNET stations and time periods omits contradictory data — only stations and intervals consistent with the dome's claim are included.
patches.description: ISS-2283 hole 5: Part 8 §8.9 — 'to support the dome' attributes purpose to data selection. Reframed to describe outcome (omission of contradictory data) rather than motive.

ISS-2283 hole 6: WIN-067 detail_evidence — 'deliberately understating the discrepancy' (×2 instances, one 'understating', one 'understates') replaced with 'conservatively understating/understates'. Removes ambiguity in adversarial reading; 'conservative' is the standard error-analysis hedge term.

obe_notes.ISS-2268: HOL-COMPLETENESS c3 hole 5 (the source for ISS-2268) explicitly states 'No fix needed. No action.' The TLDR for §2b.1 uses {{CA_NONE}} / {{CA_REVIEWED}} template variables that ARE correctly resolved by generate-html.js at build time. The rendered output shows '43 of 70 reviewed WINs have no validation code at all' — correct substitution verified. ISS-2268 is OBE.

additional_fix.description: WIN-056 patch artifact discovered incidentally: decider's 4-tone-patch commit left 'incorporated from into a dome equation' (the 'smuggled→incorporated' find-replace left an orphan 'from'). Fixed to 'incorporated into a dome equation' in WIN-056.tldr_evidence. Filed as advisory note — no separate ISS opened since this is a one-token fix bundled here.

tldr_verdict: ISS-2268 OBE (template vars render correctly — curmudgeon hole said 'No action'). ISS-2272 renumber complete (4.6→4.5 in heading + 3 prose xrefs + 1 anchor link). ISS-2283 holes 4-6 patched (behavior attribution language, not intent). Holes 7-8 are calibration advisories deferred to analyst MODE-0 template guidance.
